CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. The N-day window is configured in NPPatch Settings under Donations > GAU Allocations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The total dollar amount of Allocations from Closed/Won Opportunities in the last N days. The value of N is configured in NPPatch Settings.
CustomField.label: Total Allocations Last N Days
